Mtn To Transfer Case From Arb To Mediation; & Change The Osc For Arb Set For 9/16/04
Off Calendar Sep-10-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff George Gocke's motion to transfer case from Arbitration to Mediation and change the OSC set for 9/16/04 is heard this day. There being no appearance and no objection, the court's tentative ruling to grant Plaintiff's motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Moving party to prepare order within 5 days. Court ordered case set for Mediation OSC for 11/10/04, 10:00 AM, D-212; Jury trial set for 3/7/05 at 9:30 AM, Dept. 206. Court will send notice of time and place of Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee (212)
